WITH RankedDissolution AS (
  SELECT
    "treatment",
    - "G" AS "negative_G",
    "OmegaAragonite",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY - "G" DESC) as rn
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
)
SELECT
  "treatment",
  "negative_G" AS "max_negative_G",
  "OmegaAragonite"
FROM RankedDissolution
WHERE rn = 1

SELECT
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN "shell.wt" END) / AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN "shell.wt" END)
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT
  "treatment",
  REGR_SLOPE("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope_G_on_OmegaAragonite,
  CORR("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_correlation_G_OmegaAragonite
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY
  "treatment"

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'Mytilus trossulus'
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'Mytilus californianus'
  END AS species,
  CASE
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END AS sealing_status,
  COUNT("shell.number") AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate_negative_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE
  "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'Mytilus trossulus'
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'Mytilus californianus'
  END,
  CASE
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END

SELECT
  "treatment",
  AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_weight,
  STDDEV("shell.wt") AS stddev_shell_weight
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY
  "treatment"

SELECT
  "treatment",
  AVG(-"G") AS "mean_dissolution_rate_neg_G",
  1.96 * (STDDEV_SAMP("G") / SQRT(COUNT("G"))) AS "ci_half_width_95_percent"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE
  "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY
  "treatment"

WITH Unsealed_Californianus AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(-"G") AS mean_unsealed,
        VAR_SAMP(-"G

SELECT
  "treatment",
  percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY - "G") AS "median_negative_G"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY
  "treatment"

SELECT
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN -1 * "G" ELSE NULL END) / AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN -1 * "G" ELSE NULL END)
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE
  "OmegaAragonite" < 1

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 0 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 2 THEN '0 to <2'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 2 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 4 THEN '2 to <4'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 4 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 6 THEN '4 to <6'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 6 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 8 THEN '6 to <8'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 8 AND "OmegaAragonite" <= 10 THEN '8 to <=10'
    ELSE 'Outside 0-10 range'
  END AS "OmegaAragonite_bin",
  COUNT(*) AS "incubation_count"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" >= 0 AND "OmegaAragonite" <= 10
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 0 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 2 THEN '0 to <2'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 2 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 4 THEN '2 to <4'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 4 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 6 THEN '4 to <6'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 6 AND "OmegaAragonite" < 8 THEN '6 to <8'
    WHEN "OmegaAragonite" >= 8 AND "OmegaAragonite" <= 10 THEN '8 to <=10'
    ELSE 'Outside 0-10 range'
  END
ORDER BY
  MIN("OmegaAragonite")

SELECT
  "shell.number",
  ("G" - AVG("G") OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment")) / STDDEV("G") OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment") AS z_score_dissolution_rate
FROM
  "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
ORDER BY
  z_score_dissolution_rate DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  "OmegaAragonite",
  AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "moving_avg_G"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE
  "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY
  "OmegaAragonite"

SELECT
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY "G" DESC) AS "percentile_rank_G"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
ORDER BY
  "percentile_rank_G" DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  "stim",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency,
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_trials
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY
  "stim"

SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov")
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE
  "stim" = 'visual'

SELECT
  "stim",
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "call_status" = 2 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS "acoustic_response_rate",
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "vs_status" = 2 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS "visual_response_rate",
  COUNT(*) AS "number_of_trials"
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY
  "stim"

SELECT
  "stim",
  SUM(CASE WHEN "mov_status" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS "fraction_moving_towards_robot",
  COUNT(*) AS "total_trials"
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY
  "stim"

SELECT
  "stimulus",
  REGR_SLOPE("vsig01", "noise") AS slope_vsig01_on_noise,
  CORR("vsig01", "noise") AS pearson_corr_vsig01_noise
FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
GROUP BY
  "stimulus"

SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN "Distance from nearest road (m)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "missing_distance_to_road",
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "missing_light_intensity",

WITH YearlyStats AS (
  SELECT
    "Year",
    AVG("Survived.mod") AS yearly_survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM (
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "strong_df"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "fluke_df"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "ecg_df"

SELECT
  COUNT(T1."Name")
FROM "strong_df" AS T1
LEFT JOIN "fluke_df" AS T2
  ON T1."Name" = T2."Name"
  AND T1."Year" = T2."Year"
  AND T1."Season" = T2."Season"
WHERE
  T2."Name" IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT
  "Season"
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE
  "Season" NOT IN ('Autumn', 'Spring', 'Summer')

  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM "strong_df"

      "Name"

      "Name"
